Meeting in Portland:  Utilities, Electric: Retail Wheeling:
 FERC Chief Asks Congress For Retroactive Rate ...
emails.body: Re: Meeting in Portland: Utilities, Electric: Retail Wheeling: FERC Chief Asks Congress For Retroactive Rate If there is any possibility of doing it on Wednesday and Thursday, that would work much better with my schedule, but I can be flexible if necessary. Thanks very much for coordinating. Best, Jeff

emails.body: Re: Meeting in Portland: Utilities, Electric: Retail Wheeling: FERC Chief Asks Congress For Retroactive Rate Thursday will not work for Richard because he is scheduled to be out of town for an ENA Legal Conference. Twanda Sweet Enron North America Corp. EB3821 (713) 853-9402 Jeff Dasovich@ENRON 09/25/2000 10:23 AM
